feed.title: Scholar Alerts — Clean Feed
feed.subtitle: Google Scholar alerts reformatted as individual article entries

entry.title: Scale-Dependent Emergence of Hindered Diffusion in the Brain Extracellular Space
entry.content:
Authors: Q Gresil, I Calaresu, FL Sebastian, B Flavel, J Zaumseil... -arXivpreprintarXiv..., 2026

Abstract: Diffusion in living tissues governs essential physiological processes and is well studied within cells. Yet how extracellular molecular motion emerges from the structural complexity of tissues remains unresolved. In the brain, molecules move ...

Tags: brain, Reviewer, too: Complexity

Alert: arxiv" + intitle:"emergence (keyword alert)

entry.title: Comments on the Emergence of 4D Topological Amplitudes in M-Theory
entry.content:
Authors: M Artime, R Blumenhagen, A Gligovic, P Leivadaros -arXivpreprintarXiv..., 2026

Abstract: The M-theoretic Emergence Proposal claims that all of the terms in the low-energy action arise from quantum effects. After reviewing the current status of this proposal, we focus on four-dimensional compactifications with $N=2$ supersymmetry, where ...

Tags: brain, Reviewer, too: Complexity

entry.title: Targeted Regulation of Adipose Tissue Macrophages from an Immunometabolic Perspective: A Novel Therapeutic Approach for Obesity-Related Metabolic Disorders

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: C Jia, X Li, E Wu, C Zhu, Y Cheng, F Zhao, H LI - Frontiers in Immunology

Abstract: The global prevalence of obesity and its associated metabolic syndromes, characterized by chronic inflammation and metabolic disorders, poses a major health threat worldwide. This makes it urgent to gain a deeper understanding of its ...
